commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

commit.message:
Replace Executive Summary with concise Introduction + Scope + Protocol Overview

Remove sales-pitch framing (Executive Summary, Problem Space, Solution
headings). Replace with a short non-normative Introduction, explicit
Scope/Non-Goals, and Protocol Overview with the sequence diagram and a
brief prose walkthrough. The spec now opens with orientation, not
persuasion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove '--' separator in astro preview spawn args that blocked deploys

The '--' between 'preview' and '--host' in spawn() calls caused Astro
to ignore --host and --port flags. The preview server bound to localhost
instead of 127.0.0.1, so waitForServer() timed out on all three
Playwright-based quality gates (a11y-runtime, runtime-errors, perf),
blocking every deploy since Feb 18.

Also updates CLAUDE.md with Biome linting, Consult Worker, and other
missing documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: portfolio
repository.description: Portfolio site — Astro, p5.js, 16 project case studies

commit.message:
Fix Claude API: use AsyncAnthropic instead of sync Anthropic client

The identify_with_claude() function is async and called via
asyncio.gather, but was using the synchronous anthropic.Anthropic
client. This blocks the event loop and can fail silently in async
contexts like FastAPI/uvicorn.

Changes:
- Switch from anthropic.Anthropic to anthropic.AsyncAnthropic
- Properly await sdk_client.messages.create()
- Update model to claude-sonnet-4-20250514
- Remove unused httpx client parameter (SDK manages its own client)
- Clean up excessive DEBUG prints, keep concise error logging
- Bump anthropic requirement to >=0.40.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: ANE LoRA Training — Neural Engine gradient computation on Apple Silicon

First public demonstration of LoRA fine-tuning gradients running on
Apple's Neural Engine via private APIs.

Key discoveries:
- matmul MIL op does NOT work on ANE — only conv
- Spatial dimension must be >= 16 AND a multiple of 16
- Conv-as-matmul pattern for arbitrary matrix multiplication
- Subprocess isolation for ~119 compile handle leak

Verified: 192 ANE dispatches, 0 fallbacks, converging loss on
Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct-4bit with 16 LoRA modules on M4 Mac Mini.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 1-2: 핵심 CRUD API + 프론트엔드 기본 + PDF 생성 서비스

Backend:
- units/tags/passages/questions/worksheets CRUD API 전체 구현
- R2 이미지 업로드 서비스
- 시험지 저장/조회/복제/삭제 + 권한 체크
- GET /api/worksheets/:id/pdf → PDF 3종 생성 연동

Frontend:
- React Router + zustand 인증 상태 관리
- 반응형 사이드바 레이아웃 (AppShell)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Fix Huffman weight trimming and offset decode bugs — 48/48 conformance (#755)

Two bugs in the native Zstd decompressor caused 12/48 conformance test
failures (all text-pattern tests):

1. parseHuffmanTreeDescriptor trimmed trailing zero weights. Zero weights
   are significant — the implicit last symbol's identity depends on the
   weight array length. Removing trailing zeros shifts which symbol gets
   the implicit weight, causing single-byte substitution errors.

2. decodeOffsetValue had a special case for code 0 returning extraBits
   instead of applying the uniform RFC 8878 formula (1 <<< code) + extraBits.
   For code 0, the correct result is 1 (repeat offset 1), not 0.

Both fixes are from PR #722 (which developed merge conflicts), applied
cleanly to current master. Conformance tests now pass 48/48.

commit.message:
fix: rewrite deploy script to preserve media across deploys

The old script had a critical bug: `docker cp` on Windows puts files
directly in the destination when it doesn't exist (no subdirectory),
but the script expected files in a nested `originals/` path. Backup
count was always 0, so media was lost on every `down -v`.

New flow: stop containers → backup originals via docker cp (pre-create
dest dir so subdirectory is created) → down -v (clean slate) → extract
fresh code → start fresh containers → re-upload originals via API
(full reprocessing with new code) → verify count matches → delete
backup only on match.

Edge cases handled: first deploy (no containers), empty gallery,
stale backup from failed deploy, partial upload failure.
